roa.docketEntryComment: SURRENDER
SURRENDER
DEFT OFFERS APOLOGY TO CRT & POLICE OFFICER,CLEMONS/J #259(GIVEN TO CSR TO MAIL TO OFFICER W/ANY OF DEFT'S APOLOGY)$200 REST PD IN FULL IN OPEN COURT,IN CASH

IN CAMERA HRG;A/JWV;CT1-10851(A)VC/F-SP3Y/ESS C/C TO ACTION #137850ALLEGS PUR 12022,1PC-STYD;5YPROB;CTS198D;W/S;ALC CNSLNG DIR BY APD;NO WEAREST ALL VCTM &10%FEE;$100RF EA CT-STYD PENDING PYMENT REST;$25PC
ESS LIFTED-SP3Y;190CJ--94SAGE=CTS284D;VF1
BWR 103194;CONT TO 110394 S25 845AM FOR SAME
DEFT FTA;BW;NB;OR REVK
BW;OR REV'D-STAY 9/7/94 AT 845AM S25 FOR SURRENDER
DEFT PERS ADV MORRISEY/CONSTL RTS;DEFT WVS RT FOR HRGCONT 8/31/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR SURRENDER/REMAND & SENT
CONT 7/13/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR HG MTR/DA
CONT 5/18/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR TS OR DISPO MTR/DA
TRANSF TO D25 FOR HG MTR/DA AT 845AM ON 5/18/94
ADDNL CTS24D
CLERK REC'D $132 FOR REST;PROB CONT SAME T/C
CNSL APPTD;REF APD S/R TOBE FILED 5/27/93;REMANDED
MO TO W/D PLEA NG-GRTD;ADV/PERS WVS CONST RTS;PLED G CTS1&2-10851VCADMIT ALLEG PUR 12022,1PC EA CT;CT MKS FINDINGS
DEEMED PRETRIED
BAIL EXON OR DEFT'S OR REVKD;REMANDED;ARR;PLD NG EA CT W/ATTENDANT ALLEGS
HTA, BAIL SET AT ORCT
